meta.title: Push MD E2E
meta.description: Boot a WordPress site with Push MD, Gutenberg Guidelines, and seeded content active.
meta.author: adamziel

'Administrator', 'number' => 1 ) ); $admin = $admins[0]; $experiments = get_option( 'gutenberg-experiments' ); if ( ! is_array( $experiments ) ) { $experiments = array(); } $experiments['gutenberg-guidelines'] = true; update_option( 'gutenberg-experiments', $experiments ); if ( class_exists( 'PMD_Plugin' ) ) { PMD_Plugin::install_default_agent_skill(); } update_option( 'permalink_structure', '/%postname%/' ); flush_rewrite_rules(); $hello = get_page_by_path( 'hello-world', OBJECT, 'post' ); if ( $hello ) { wp_update_post( array( 'ID' => $hello->ID, 'post_title' => 'Hello World', 'post_content' => '

', 'post_status' => 'publish', ); if ( $template ) { $template_args['ID'] = $template->ID; wp_update_post( $template_args ); } else { wp_insert_post( $template_args ); } list( $raw_password ) = WP_Application_Passwords::create_new_application_password( $admin->ID, array( 'name' => 'Push MD E2E' ) ); $password = preg_replace( '/\s+/', '', $raw_password ); file_put_contents( '__PUSH_MD_CREDENTIALS_FILE__', wp_json_encode( array( 'username' => $admin->user_login, 'password' => $password, 'post_slug' => 'hello-world', 'page_slug' => 'sample-page', 'guideline_skill_slug' => 'push-md', ) ) );
